_note: Committed v22.1b constants (2x-image sigmas; divide by 2 for the HTML 1x ref). Run through halmodel.render_rule = asymmetric+magenta emit (bB asymmetric blue-suppress + bP*min(R,B) purple driver) + high-pass glow (apply_halation highpass=True default).
